title: Application - Fresh install mobile application
scenario: Verify fresh installation of Lens mobile app from Play Store or App Store and successful onboarding initiation
steps: Uninstall the Lens mobile app if it is already present on the device.
Navigate to the Play Store (Android) or App Store (iOS).
Search for and select the Lens mobile app.
Tap the Install button to download and install the app.
Confirm the app is installed successfully (e.g., app icon appears on the home screen or app drawer).
Open the app and verify that the user can begin the onboarding process.
expected: The Lens mobile app is installed successfully, and the user is able to start the onboarding process.
